description:
Our eBay Store: https://ebay.us/RGj1W6
All of my links: https://linktr.ee/garage_flips

Lonnie and Candice pack 13 EBAY orders in this Part 1 of a busy Monday packing session — covering everything from a $47 ICM Lauffer Italy Boca soup spoon to a 100-lb 1961 Collier's Encyclopedia complete set sold on Etsy for $220 with free shipping. The hero pack of the day is the Collier's encyclopedia set: 24 volumes plus 3 yearbooks, pre-packed in four 12×12×12 boxes, with Lonnie walking through the actual shipping math — UPS Ground vs Media Mail, single combined 50lb shipment vs four separate 25lb boxes, plus the cost of Pirate Ship insurance — landing on the option that nets ~$80 profit while keeping the carrier (and the books) happy.

Twelve other packs go out today: a Bocomal FR Cat 4 duck-quilt lined jacket coat to Texas, a Halo 3 SPNKr Xbox 360 missile controller case shell, a multi-item Urban Decay 24/7 Glide On eye pencil order (STASH, SABBATH, ALKALINE, Deep Wine, SMOG variants), Schutt Y Flex 500 youth shoulder pads ($5 buy → $25 sale), a multi-figure G.I. Joe Cobra lot heading to fellow reseller Kevin (the Tennessee Picker), a Nintendo Gameboy / DS / Switch Lite mini backpack, a pair of Brighton Skye platform wedge heels on Poshmark, a "Four Islanders" vintage reel lot to Oregon, a Lot of 12 Viktor & Rolf Flowerbomb perfume samples (with hazmat handling discussion), more Urban Decay cosmetics, and a Hasegawa 1/72 Hurricane Mk.I Late Type Battle of Britain plastic model kit closing things out.

Full eBay shipping math, packing technique discussion (knife-blade swap, ground advantage poly mailers, 16x12x10 vs 12x12x8 box selection, Pirate Ship insurance pricing), bonus story about Friday's $5-fill-a-bag warehouse haul (two trash bags of craft supplies for $10 — coming soon to Shed Flips), and the running reel-lot meta-conversation (250 of ~2,500 reels sold across 8 lots, ~10% sell-through, plenty of inventory ahead). If you watch reseller and packing-channel content for the day-in-the-life rhythm — orders coming in, packs going out, banter while we work — this is exactly that.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS
0:00 40 orders today (split into two videos)
1:36 ICM Lauffer Italy Boca soup spoon ($47)
2:45 Bocomal FR Cat 4 duck-quilt jacket (Texas)
4:30 Halo 3 SPNKr Xbox 360 missile controller case ($63 to Vinnie)

14:07 G.I. Joe Cobra Rex lot (Kevin the Tennessee Picker)
17:32 Nintendo Gameboy/DS/Switch Lite mini backpack

20:30 1961 Collier's Encyclopedia set — 4 boxes, the shipping math

Thanks for hanging out with us in the shed packing today's orders. If you like watching real reselling life as it happens, subscribe and we'll see y'all in the next one.
